torch_pattern: v = kvpe_cache[..., :head_dim_v]  # V is read from first head_dim_v (kv_lora_rank) dims of K (MLA semantics); k = kvpe_cache  # gathered via page_table at cur_pos; attn_out = torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention(q, k, v, scale=scale)  # decode: single-position causal query against paged KV cache
applicability_notes: MLA decode variant: only the combined KVPE cache (kv_lora_rank + rope dims = 576 for DeepSeek) is passed as K; V is implicitly the first head_dim_v (kv_lora_rank=512) columns of K. Replaces torch chain of (page-table gather -> slice V from K -> SDPA). Input q shape [1, bsz_local, num_heads, kv_lora_rank+rope_dim]; output [1, bsz_local, num_heads, kv_lora_rank].
